name: AIOS — ComfyUI Image Generator + FB Ads Upload

message.text:
=✅ [AIOS] Angle "{{ $json.angle_title }}" → {{ $json.image_count }}/6 ảnh FB Ads ready!
📎 Mở AIOS → Tab Ad Images để review & tạo Creative.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'ComfyUI pipeline started', angle_id: $('Webhook — Approved Angle').first().json.angle_id }) }}

env_vars_required: AIOS_WEBHOOK_URL — your AIOS server base URL
AIOS_SECRET_KEY — shared secret for webhook auth
ZALO_USER_ID — your Zalo user ID for notifications
_comments.trigger: POST to /webhook/comfyui-trigger with JSON: { angle_id, angle_title, p1_persona, p2_pain, p3_moment, p4_promise, p5_proof, p6_pull, product_name, workspace_id }
_comments.output: 6 images uploaded to FB Ads Library, hashes stored in AIOS, Zalo notification sent
_comments.flow: Webhook → Build 6 prompts → ComfyUI generate (parallel) → Poll ready → Fetch binary → Upload FB → Collect hashes → Notify AIOS + Zalo
